sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96780" key="sti/bi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στίβι</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, Lat. <sense id="n96780.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stibium</tr_>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στίμμι</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
